annotations.annotation: Regulation .01C amended effective July 10, 1989 (16:13 Md. R. 1419)
Regulation .01H amended effective July 10, 1989 (16:13 Md. R. 1419)
Regulation .01I adopted effective July 10, 1989 (16:13 Md. R. 1419)
Regulation .01J adopted effective July 10, 1989 (16:13 Md. R. 1419)

Regulation .01 recodified to Regulation .01-1 and new Regulation .01 adopted as an emergency provision effective June 20, 1994 (21:14 Md. R. 1226); emergency status expired December 3, 1994 (Emergency provisions are temporary and not printed in COMAR)
Regulation .02A amended effective September 19, 1988 (15:19 Md. R. 2245)
Regulation .02 amended effective July 10, 1989 (16:13 Md. R. 1419)
Regulation .03 amended effective July 10, 1989 (16:13 Md. R. 1419)
Chapter repealed as an emergency provision effective May 19, 1995 (22:12 Md. R. 896); repealed permanently effective August 14, 1995 (22:16 Md. R. 1219)
